_meta.description: Public content safety filter — controls what data is hidden from all public-facing surfaces (website, emails, API responses). Stored in S3, consumed by site-api Lambda and email Lambdas.

rules.vice_streaks: Exclude any vice whose name case-insensitively matches blocked_vices from all public outputs.
rules.habit_data: Exclude matching habits from public habit displays, heatmaps, adherence reports.
rules.temptation_log: Never surface temptation entries with matching categories.
rules.ai_responses: System prompt must instruct Claude to never mention blocked terms.
rules.email_digests: All email Lambdas must filter blocked vices from BoD commentary.
rules.journal_entries: Passages mentioning blocked terms must not appear on public pages.
